company.name: GeethaFoods Co.
company.description: Premium quality fresh and frozen produce for businesses and households. Browse our catalog and order directly via WhatsApp.
company.about: Geetha Foods is a leading food-service distribution company supplying premium products to restaurants, cafés, hotels, bakeries, and cloud kitchens. We partner with trusted brands such as ITC, Amul, Veeba, Del Monte, McCain, Milky Mist, Yummiez, Mala's, Fun Foods, and many more. With a diverse portfolio spanning frozen foods, dairy, beverages, sauces, and kitchen essentials, we provide a one-stop procurement solution for the hospitality industry. Our strong distribution network ensures consistent quality, timely deliveries, and reliable service. We are committed to helping food businesses streamline operations and enhance customer experiences. At Geetha Foods, we don't just supply products—we build lasting partnerships that drive growth.

products.name: Veg Mayonnaise
products.description: Creamy vegetarian mayonnaise with a rich and smooth texture. Perfect as a sandwich spread, burger topping, salad dressing, or dip for snacks.

products.name: Corn & Cheese Momos
products.description: Delicious frozen momos filled with sweet corn and creamy cheese, wrapped in soft dumpling dough. Ready to steam, pan-fry, or deep-fry for a quick and satisfying snack.

products.name: Schezwan Sauce
products.description: Spicy and flavorful Schezwan sauce made with chili, garlic, and aromatic spices. Perfect for stir-fries, noodles, fried rice, momos, and as a dipping sauce.

products.name: French Fries 6MM
products.description: Premium 6 mm regular-cut frozen French fries made from carefully selected potatoes. Crispy on the outside and fluffy inside when cooked, ideal for restaurants, cafes, and home kitchens.

products.name: Veg Burger Patty Supreme
products.description: Crispy vegetable burger patties made with a blend of fresh vegetables and savory seasonings. Ready to cook and perfect for burgers, wraps, or quick snacks.

products.name: Chicken Burger Patty Supreme
products.description: Juicy chicken burger patties prepared from premium chicken and seasoned with flavorful spices. Easy to cook and ideal for burgers, sandwiches, and quick meals.

products.name: Chicken Wings
